records.question: Which colleges named Edmonton School are located in McGill and led by Samir Chahine?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT college.college_id FROM college
WHERE college.college_location = 'McGill' AND college.name = 'Edmonton School' AND college.leader_name = 'Samir Chahine'
records.pred_sql: SELECT college.College_ID FROM college WHERE college.Name = 'Edmonton School' AND college.College_Location = 'McGill' AND college.Leader_Name = 'Samir Chahine'

records.question: Which Calgary School colleges are located in St. Francis Xavier with Andre Arlain as leader and have Lee Trevino from the United States as a member?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT college.college_id FROM college
JOIN member ON college.college_id = member.college_id
WHERE college.college_location = 'St. Francis Xavier' AND college.leader_name = 'Andre Arlain' AND member.country = 'United States' AND member.name = 'Lee Trevino' AND college.name = 'Calgary School'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT college.College_ID 
FROM college 
JOIN member ON college.College_ID = member.College_ID 
WHERE college.College_Location = 'St. Francis Xavier' 
AND college.Leader_Name = 'Andre Arlain' 
AND member.Name = 'Lee Trevino' 
AND member.Country = 'United States'
